name: smart-compact
description: Pick a Codex profile and create a new task with it from the Codex app.

interface.shortDescription: Pick a profile before a new Codex task starts.
interface.longDescription: Use an in-app profile picker to create a new Codex task with Smart Compact, another installed named profile, or the shared default configuration. Also includes the Smart Compact token-efficiency skill.
defaultPrompt: Start a Smart Compact task in this workspace
Create a task and let me pick its profile
